spec: ovary reserve OT-CFM vs independent-CFM (generative distribution transport, NOT discriminative)
interpretation: OT-CFM gives straighter reserve-transport flow than independent coupling; both confirm a generative reserve shift on ovary features. AMH linkage is INDIRECT here (PCO=high-AMH phenotype + AFC r=0.43); direct AMH-conditional FM lives in the endocrine arm (d=1.14).
